days.title: Arrival & Marina Bay Introduction
days.weather: Hot and humid, 31°C, Chance of thunderstorms in late afternoon.
activities: Check into hotel near Marina Bay; drop luggage.
Walk along Marina Bay Promenade to see the Merlion Park.
Visit Gardens by the Bay (outdoor Supertree Grove) before sunset.
days.budgetNote: Accommodation approx $250/night. Dinner at Maxwell Food Centre ($15).

days.title: Singapore Flyer & City Highlights
activities: Morning: Visit the Singapore Flyer for panoramic views.
Afternoon: Explore Chinatown and visit Buddha Tooth Relic Temple.
Evening: Watch the Spectra Light & Water Show at Marina Bay Sands.
days.budgetNote: Singapore Flyer tickets ~$33/person. Hotel ~$250. Dinner in Chinatown ($20).

days.title: Cultural Heritage & Sentosa
activities: Morning: Explore Little India and Serangoon Road.
Afternoon: Take Sentosa Express to Sentosa Island; relax at Siloso Beach.
Evening: Dinner at VivoCity Mall.
days.budgetNote: Hotel ~$250. Sentosa access is free, but beach activities cost extra. Lunch in Little India ($15).

days.title: Nature & Urban Greenery
activities: Morning: Visit the Singapore Botanic Gardens (UNESCO World Heritage Site).
Afternoon: Explore Orchard Road for shopping and street food.
Evening: Night Safari or River Wonders (if budget permits, otherwise walk along Singapore River).
days.budgetNote: Botanic Gardens entry is free. Hotel ~$250. Dinner at hawker center ($10).

days.title: Final Souvenirs & Departure
activities: Morning: Last-minute shopping at Mustafa Centre or Jewel Changi Airport.
Afternoon: Visit Jewel Changi Airport's HSBC Rain Vortex.
Departure.
days.budgetNote: Checkout. Final meals and souvenirs within remaining budget. Total trip cost tracked against $1200 limit.

days.title: Arrival and Victoria Harbour Lights
days.weather: Hot and humid, ~30°C, chance of afternoon thunderstorms.
activities: Check into hotel in Tsim Sha Tsui or Mong Kok.
Walk along Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade for sunset views.
Watch the Symphony of Lights show.
days.budgetNote: Low cost: Accommodation deposit and ferry ride (HK$2.6).

days.title: Central Heritage and Peak Views
activities: Explore Central district heritage buildings.
Take the Peak Tram to Victoria Peak.
Dinner at a local dim sum restaurant.
days.budgetNote: Moderate: Peak Tram round-trip (~HK$128) and lunch.

days.title: Kowloon Culture and Street Food
activities: Visit Hong Kong Museum of History.
Wander through Mong Kok's Ladies Market.
Try street food in Yau Ma Tei.
days.budgetNote: Low cost: Free museum entry and affordable street snacks.

days.title: Island Hopping and Nature
activities: Take a ferry to Lantau Island.
Visit Po Lin Monastery and Big Buddha.
Explore Tai O fishing village.
days.budgetNote: High cost: Ngong Ping 360 ticket (~HK$390). Budget conscious alternative: Take public bus instead of cable car.

days.title: Shopping and Modern HK
activities: Shop in Causeway Bay.
Visit K11 MUSEA for art and design.
Evening cruise or waterfront dining.
days.budgetNote: Variable: Depends on shopping choices. Free entry to malls and museums.

days.title: Departure and Last Souvenirs
activities: Final breakfast at local cafe.
Buy souvenirs at Union Square or airport duty-free.
Head to airport for departure.
days.budgetNote: Low cost: Last meal and transit.

days.title: Arrival and Marina Bay Glow
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 26-31°C, with a chance of brief afternoon thunderstorms.
activities: Check into accommodation and settle in.
Walk along the Marina Bay promenade to see the Financial District skyline.
Enjoy dinner at a local hawker center for affordable local cuisine.
days.budgetNote: Initial setup costs; meals kept low-cost at hawker centers to preserve budget.

days.title: Cultural Heritage in Chinatown and Little India
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 26-31°C, intermittent showers.
activities: Explore Buddha Tooth Relic Temple and Chinatown shops.
Visit Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple in Little India.
Stroll through Mustafa Centre for a diverse shopping experience.
days.budgetNote: Most temples are free to enter; shopping offers a range of price points.

days.title: Nature and Gardens by the Bay
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 26-31°C, high humidity.
activities: Explore the Cloud Forest and Flower Dome.
Walk through the OCBC Skyway among the Supertrees.
Visit the Singapore River districts for a sunset boat ride.
days.budgetNote: Gardens by the Bay conservatories are a significant expense; book tickets in advance for discounts.

days.title: Sentosa Island Adventure
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 27-32°C, slight chance of rain.
activities: Take the Sentosa Express cable car to the island.
Visit Universal Studios Singapore.
Relax at Siloso Beach in the evening.
days.budgetNote: Theme park tickets are pricey; consider a combo pass if visiting multiple attractions.

days.title: Colonial History and Art
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 26-31°C, occasional showers.
activities: Tour the National Museum of Singapore.
Explore the Civic District and Raffles Hotel.
Visit the National Gallery for Southeast Asian art.
days.budgetNote: Gallery entry is free for first-time visitors (check current promotions); coffee at Raffles is splurge-worthy.

days.title: Nature and Wildlife at Night
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 26-31°C, high humidity.
activities: Spend the morning at the Singapore Zoo.
Have lunch at River Wonders.
End the day with a night safari experience or light dinner in East Coast Park.
days.budgetNote: Zoo entry is included in the budget; consider packed lunches to save on dining costs.

days.title: Shopping and Last Minute Gems
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 26-31°C, low chance of rain.
activities: Browse for souvenirs at Orchard Road or Jewel Changi Airport.
Visit the ArtScience Museum.
Enjoy a farewell dinner at a hawker center or casual local eatery.
days.budgetNote: Shopping budget varies; focus on free attractions like the Rain Vortex at Jewel.

days.title: Departure and Reflection
days.weather: Seasonal estimate: Hot and humid, 26-31°C, generally clear skies.
activities: Final breakfast at a local kopitiam.
Early departure to Changi Airport.
Explore Jewel Changi’s indoor forest before flight.
days.budgetNote: Minimal costs for the final day; ensure luggage storage fees are accounted for if needed.

days.title: Arrival and Marina Bay Introduction
days.weather: Tropical; hot and humid with a chance of afternoon thunderstorms. Approx 31°C/88°F.
activities: Check into hotel and freshen up.
Walk along Marina Bay Promenade to see the Merlion Park.
Enjoy dinner at a hawker center near Chinatown or Little India.

attractions.name: Marina Bay Sands SkyPark Observation Deck

days.budgetNote: Accommodation deposit and initial meals. Budget for transport via MRT.

days.title: Cultural Heritage: Chinatown and Little India
days.weather: Tropical; sunny intervals with high humidity. Approx 32°C/90°F.
activities: Visit Buddha Tooth Relic Temple in Chinatown.
Explore street art and shops in Haji Lane.
Wander through Little India, visiting Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple.
days.budgetNote: Free entry for most cultural sites. Budget for local shopping and modest dining.

days.title: Nature and Gardens
days.weather: Tropical; partly cloudy with possible rain showers. Approx 31°C/88°F.
activities: Spend the morning at Gardens by the Bay, focusing on Cloud Forest and Flower Dome.
Watch the Garden Rhapsody light show at Supertree Grove in the evening.
Dinner at a nearby restaurant in Bayfront area.
days.budgetNote: Gardens by the Bay conservatories require tickets. Allocate significant budget here.

days.title: Sentosa Island Adventure
activities: Take the Sentosa Express or cable car to the island.
Visit Universal Studios Singapore for half-day fun.
Relax at Siloso Beach or enjoy the S.E.A. Aquarium.
days.budgetNote: Theme park and aquarium tickets are expensive. Consider combo passes.

days.title: Modern Art and Shopping
activities: Explore the National Gallery Singapore housed in the former Supreme Court and City Hall.
Head to Orchard Road for world-class shopping.
Dinner at a trendy spot in Joo Chiat/Katong for Peranakan cuisine.
days.budgetNote: Gallery entry may have fees. Shopping budget depends on personal interest.

days.title: Zoo and Night Safari
days.weather: Tropical; evening might be cooler but still humid. Approx 30°C/86°F.
activities: Visit the Singapore Zoo during the day to see open-concept exhibits.
Have lunch at the zoo's food court.
Experience the Night Safari, the world's first nighttime wildlife park.
days.budgetNote: Both zoos require substantial ticket budgets. Book online in advance for discounts.

days.title: Raffles Place and Colonial History
days.weather: Tropical; sunny with isolated showers. Approx 31°C/88°F.
activities: Walk around Raffles Place and see the Fullerton Hotel.
Visit the Asian Civilisations Museum.
Enjoy a farewell dinner at a Michelin-starred hawker stall or local fine dining.
days.budgetNote: Museum entry is affordable. Farewell dinner can vary widely in cost.

days.title: Departure and Last-Minute Souvenirs
activities: Check out of hotel.
Last-minute souvenir shopping at Changi Airport Jewel.
Explore the Canopy Park at Jewel Changi before flight.
days.budgetNote: Budget for airport transit and final purchases.

days.title: Arrival and Marina Bay Lights
days.weather: Tropical, 27°C, Partly Cloudy with chance of evening rain.
activities: Check into hotel and freshen up.
Walk along Marina Bay Promenade and view the Merlion.
Watch the Spectra Light & Water Show at 8 PM.
days.budgetNote: Accommodation deposit paid. Low-cost walking activities today.

days.title: Cultural Heritage in Little India and Kampong Glam
activities: Explore Tekka Centre for breakfast and local spices.
Visit Sultan Mosque and Haji Lane for boutique shopping.
Dinner at a local hawker center in the area.
days.budgetNote: Budget-friendly food options available at hawker centers.

days.title: Nature and Conservation at River Wonders
activities: Visit River Wonders to see Asian river ecosystems.
Stroll through the adjacent Singapore Zoo area (exterior views).
Light dinner near Mandai Road.
days.budgetNote: Attraction tickets consume a significant portion of daily budget.

days.title: Chinatown History and Food Tour
activities: Visit Buddha Tooth Relic Temple.
Explore Chinatown Complex Food Centre.
Browse street art and shops on Pagoda Street.
days.budgetNote: Free entry to temples and galleries; focus spending on food.

days.title: Sentosa Island Leisure
activities: Take the Sentosa Express cable car or monorail.
Relax at Siloso Beach.
Visit Universal Studios Singapore or S.E.A. Aquarium.
days.budgetNote: High cost day due to theme park tickets and transport.

days.title: Modern Art and Shopping at Orchard Road
activities: Visit ArtScience Museum for interactive exhibits.
Shopping spree atION Orchard or Takashimaya.
Late night supper at Lau Pa Sat.
days.budgetNote: Flexible budget for shopping; control spending on souvenirs.

days.title: Final Souvenirs and Departure
activities: Last-minute shopping at Jewel Changi Airport.
Enjoy the HSBC Rain Vortex inside Jewel.
Departure from Changi Airport.
days.budgetNote: Final expenses for meals and last-minute purchases.
